response.justification: Exceptional match with 19+ years of experience including multiple senior/staff roles in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and full-stack development. Current position at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, addressing a key required skill. Strong testing culture (created testing frameworks, led TDD initiatives). Primary gaps are Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly listed, but deep Node.js and testing expertise make these easily learnable. Clear overqualification for the role with potential to grow into architectural leadership.
strengths: 19+ years experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded; multiple Staff-level roles demonstrating senior capability
Current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—direct match for stated requirement
Deep testing and TDD culture: created Fluent-Asserts library, Trial test runner, organized code katas; clear commitment to quality
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned in skills or experience—primary stack requirement, though Node.js expertise is deep and transferable
Vitest not mentioned—testing expertise is strong but specific framework not documented; React experience less prominent than Ember.js
PostgreSQL not mentioned—MongoDB and MySQL present, but primary database option for role not explicitly listed
